neighborhoods.name: Punta Pacifica
neighborhoods.description: Ultra-modern peninsula with gleaming skyscrapers, Trump Ocean Club, and Johns Hopkins-affiliated hospital

housing.predominantType: Luxury high-rise condos with ocean views

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Panama City. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Punta Paitilla
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent waterfront area with established high-rises, ocean views, and Cinta Costera park access
neighborhoods.character: Established waterfront, park access, ocean views
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Panama City's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Rio Abajo
neighborhoods.description: Inland neighborhood north of Punta Pacifica with local character and lower rents
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Cinta Costera / Balboa Avenue
neighborhoods.description: Waterfront park boulevard connecting Casco Viejo to Punta Pacifica with upscale living

housing.predominantType: Modern high-rise condos along the waterfront

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City
